tasks.title: Add wildcard certificate support to SSL step
tasks.description: Allow users to configure Let's Encrypt wildcard certs via DNS-01 challenge. Show DNS provider dropdown when wildcard is toggled on.

tasks.title: Mobile layout for config form
tasks.description: The two-column field-row grid breaks on screens under 640px. Switch to single-column stacked layout for mobile.

tasks.title: Add Vaultwarden template
tasks.description: Create a template for Vaultwarden (Bitwarden-compatible server) including WebSocket support and admin path rate limiting.

tasks.title: Validate SERVER_NAME field format
tasks.description: Show a warning if the user types an IP address or includes http:// in the SERVER_NAME field.

tasks.title: Cache TTL user control
tasks.description: Let users choose cache duration (15 min / 1 hour / 24 hours) instead of the fixed 1-hour TTL.
